testcases.input: nums = [1,7,3,6,5,6] Output: 3 Explanation: The pivot index is 3. Left sum = nums[0] + nums[1] + nums[2] = 1 + 7 + 3 = 11 Right sum = nums[4] + nums[5] = 5 + 6 = 11
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: The pivot index is 3. Left sum = nums[0] + nums[1] + nums[2] = 1 + 7 + 3 = 11 Right sum = nums[4] + nums[5] = 5 + 6 = 11

testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: There is no index that satisfies the conditions in the problem statement.

testcases.input: nums = [2,1,-1] Output: 0 Explanation: The pivot index is 0. Left sum = 0 (no elements to the left of index 0) Right sum = nums[1] + nums[2] = 1 + -1 = 0
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: The pivot index is 0. Left sum = 0 (no elements to the left of index 0) Right sum = nums[1] + nums[2] = 1 + -1 = 0
